name_en: P❤️B's latest soft structured tote, crafted from grained calfskin. Made in an Italian workshop with suede lining. Features the brand's iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin panels with embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD). Includes a detachable shoulder strap for easy switching between tote and shoulder bag styles. Embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD) on the back. Dimensions 30 x 13 x 24cm.
